globalNews.title: US wants Iran to pledge to stop shooting at ships in Strait of Hormuz
globalNews.summary: US media say Iran has told US officials an attack on ships crossing the strait early this week was "a mistake".

globalNews.title: Spain battles to contain one of its deadliest wildfires as at least 12 killed
globalNews.summary: At least four Britons are believed to be among the victims of the blaze, which left another 23 people missing.

globalNews.title: Indian tourists among 15 killed as speedboat capsizes in Vietnam
globalNews.summary: Local media say 21 people were saved after the boat overturned in rough seas near an island in south Vietnam.

globalNews.title: China braced for second typhoon in a week as Bavi approaches landfall
globalNews.summary: Hundreds of thousands of people are evacuated from eastern Zhejiang province, with the city of Wenzhou close to the path of the storm.

globalNews.title: US pays out $3m to victims of mystery Havana Syndrome condition reported by spies
globalNews.summary: US officials and diplomats and their families began reporting a mysterious illness a decade ago.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin nearing late stages of bear market: Jamie Coutts, Real Vision
cryptoNews.summary: Real Vision chief crypto analyst Jamie Coutts said it's far too early to call $1 million by 2030, but he's confident Bitcoin could climb up to $250,000 over the next couple of years.

cryptoNews.title: Ethereum climbs 3% on tokenization boom: Can bulls push ETH price past $1,800?
cryptoNews.summary: Despite strong tokenization gains and institutional accumulation, weak onchain and derivatives data leaves ETH vulnerable to a $1,700 retest.

cryptoNews.title: Bonzo Lend loses $9M in oracle exploit on Hedera
cryptoNews.summary: An attacker inflated the value of SAUCE collateral and borrowed $9 million from Bonzo Lend through a flaw in Supra’s on-chain oracle verifier.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin price gains nearly 10% in July, but traders still see BTC copying 2022 bear market
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin price gains approached 10% for the first two weeks of the month, but analysis warned of the bear market returning from August onward.

cryptoNews.title: Dollar stablecoins could improve FX access but amplify currency runs: IMF paper
cryptoNews.summary: An IMF working paper says dollar stablecoins can improve access to foreign currency but may also help coordinate exits from local currencies during periods of severe exchange-rate stress.

aiNews.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
aiNews.summary: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.

aiNews.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
aiNews.summary: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the feedb

aiNews.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
aiNews.summary: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.

aiNews.title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
aiNews.summary: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models

aiNews.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
aiNews.summary: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

economicCalendar.description: Consumer Price Index - key inflation measure
Federal Reserve interest rate announcement and policy statement
